landing.title: Connect
landing.subtitle: The Ultimate Digital Business Card
landing.description: Share your contact details instantly via QR code. Remember where you met someone. Keep private notes. All your connections in one place.

nfc.title: 100% Wireless
nfc.description: ConnectMe uses an NFC chipset, which is an integrated IC that enables short-range, wireless communication between two devices.

qr.title: QR Code
qr.description: Use a two-dimensional barcode, aka QR Code, as an alternative wireless communication method.

exchange.title: Seamless Exchange
exchange.description: No matter which mobile phone your contact is using, share your information with them seamlessly.

qr.title: Instant Sharing
qr.description: Share your details in seconds via QR code.

remember.title: Remember Connections
remember.description: Add notes about where and when you met someone (never shared)

privacy.title: 100% Private Notes
privacy.description: Your notes stay private and are never shared publicly

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to access your ConnectMe account

errors.emailRequiredForReset: Please enter your email address first so we can send a reset link.
errors.resetFailed: Could not send reset email. Please check if the email is correct.

auth.noInternet: Please check your internet connection and try again.
auth.resetSentDesc: Instructions to reset your password have been sent to:
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email to receive reset instructions

onboarding.privacyNote: ConnectMe will never sell your information or share it publicly. You can always change these details later in your profile settings.

account.title: Create your account
account.description: Set up your secure login details.

personal.title: Great to meet you!
personal.description: What name should appear on your card?

professional.title: What do you do?
professional.description: Add your professional title and company.

auth.emailInUse: This email is already registered. Try logging in instead.
auth.invalidEmail: The email address is not valid.
auth.weakPassword: The password is too weak. Please use at least 8 characters.
auth.networkError: Network error. Please check your internet connection.
auth.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
auth.generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
auth.invalidCredential: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
auth.userDisabled: This account has been disabled by an administrator.
auth.userNotFound: No account found with this email.
auth.emailRequired: Please enter your email address first.
auth.reauthenticate: Please log out and back in to verify your identity before deleting.

contact.invalidId: A valid Profile ID is required to save a contact.

home.title: Home
home.qrDescription: Let others scan to get your details

display.title: My QR Code
display.description: Let others scan this code to get your contact details

scanner.title: Scan QR Code
scanner.description: Point your camera at a QR code to scan
scanner.notBusinessCard: This isn't a business card QR.
scanner.align: Align QR Code inside the frame
scanner.noReachMethod: Incomplete Data: No phone or email detected

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.emptyDescription: Start networking by scanning QR codes
contacts.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to remove this contact? This action cannot be undone.

photo.title: Profile Photo
photo.description: Add a profile photo to personalize your digital business card

settings.title: Settings
settings.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 6 characters
settings.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? This action is permanent.
settings.deletePartial: Data wiped. Email will clear on next login.
settings.verifyDesc: Please enter your password to authorize deletion:

edit.title: Customize Profile
edit.desc: Tap here to add your photo and social links.

share.title: Share your QR
share.desc: Show this to others to let them save your contact.

scan.title: Scan & Connect
scan.desc: Use this to scan business cards and other ConnectMe users.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.desc: Find all your saved connections here.
